title: rubus caesius var. dolomiticus
intro: Rubus caesius var. dolomiticus, also known as the Dolomitic Black Raspberry or Alpine Black Raspberry, is a rare and unique variety of the black raspberry plant, native to the Dolomites mountains in Italy. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for soothing digestive issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Rubus caesius var. dolomiticus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus caesius var. dolomiticus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
